## Reading Rules

- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/JapanFG/boj-monetary-policy.md
- Domain: JapanFG
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: The Bank of Japan's monetary policy is the legal and operating anchor for Japan's short-term money market. The statutory objective is price stability, and the practical transmission point is the guideline for money market operations decided at Monetary Policy Meetings (MPMs).

### Second Association of Regional Banks (Dai-ni Chigin-kyō / 第二地方銀行協会)
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/dai2-chigin-kyo
- Source path: JapanFG/dai2-chigin-kyo.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/JapanFG/dai2-chigin-kyo.md
- Domain: JapanFG
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: Dai-ni Chigin-kyō (第二地銀協) is the industry body for Japan's second-tier regional banks — the lineage of former mutual savings banks (相互銀行 / sogō ginkō) that converted to ordinary commercial banks under the 1989-1992 reorganization. Membership is now around the high-30s after decades of consolidation.
- Headings: Second Association of Regional Banks (Dai-ni Chigin-kyō / 第二地方銀行協会), TL;DR, Wiki route, Legal route / statutory position (法令の根拠), Function / scope, Membership / governance, Related industry adjacency, Why this page matters

- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 2020年改正割賦販売法（令和2年法律第64号）は、クレジットカード / 後払い / BNPL のデジタル化に合わせて、(1) 認定包括信用購入あっせん業者、(2) 登録少額包括信用購入あっせん業者、(3) 決済代行・アクワイアリング側のカード番号管理、(4) 書面交付の電子化、(5) 業務停止命令を整備した改正。

- Summary: Japan insurance regulation separates risk-bearing insurers from distribution intermediaries. The underwriting entity car

- Headings: EU MiCA CASP (Crypto-Asset Service Provider) regime, 1. 制度概要, 2. CASP ライセンス 10 区分 (MiCA Article 60), 3. 主要保有事業者 (2025-2026), 4. 主要規制要件, 5. 国際比較, Cross-links

### FSA 暗号資産交換業登録制度 — 番号体系・財務局管轄・登録要件
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system
- Source path: exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 2017-04 施行の改正資金決済法により、日本は世界に先駆けて暗号資産交換業の登録制を導入。施行時点で営業中だった事業者は「みなし業者」として暫定的に営業継続が認められ、順次本登録へ移行した。2019 年の法改正で従来の「仮想通貨」呼称が「暗号資産」に統一され、業態名も「暗号資産交換業」となった。所管は金融庁（FSA）、実務窓口は各財務局。
- Headings: FSA 暗号資産交換業登録制度 — 番号体系・財務局管轄・登録要件, 制度概要, 登録番号体系, 登録要件 5 本柱, 登録から JVCEA 入会までの流れ
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-binance-japan, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-gaia, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-money-partners, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-zaif, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/japan-financial-regulation

- Summary: 世界の主要 VASP (Virtual Asset Service Provider) 規制は 8 極構造 に収斂してきた: 日本 (FSA + JVCEA 二層) / 韓国 (FSC + FIU 単一) / 香港 (SFC VATP) / シンガポール (MAS DPT) / EU (MiCA CASP) / 米国 (連邦 + 50 州フラグメント) / UAE (VARA 単独) / 英国 (FCA AML 中心 + 段階的本格化)。本エントリは 法源・ライセンス階層・必要資本・分別管理 (cold storage %)・AML/Travel Rule・ステーブルコイン規制・クロスボーダー
- Headings: グローバル VASP 規制 8 極比較マトリクス — JP / KR / HK / SG / EU / US / UAE / UK, TL;DR, Wiki route, Key facts, 1. 主要 13 軸 マトリクス, A. 法源・規制当局・施行時期, B. ライセンス区分・階層, C. 活動カバレッジ (spot / derivatives / custody / staking / lending / NFT marketplace)
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/legal-financial-licenses/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/coincheck-nem-hack-detailed-analysis, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/dmm-bitcoin-lazarus-hack-detailed-analysis, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/eu-mica-casp-regime-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-foreign-exchange-warning-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-cex-top10-comparison, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/hk-sfc-vasp-licensing-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-cex-staking-lending-regulation, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-aml-travel-rule-implementation, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-cold-storage-segregation-rules

### Japan crypto exchange overview — FSA / JVCEA regulated VASP market
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-crypto-exchange-overview
- Source path: exchanges/jp-crypto-exchange-overview.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-crypto-exchange-overview.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 日本の暗号資産交換業は、金融庁・財務局の登録制と JVCEA 自主規制の二層で成り立つ。2017-04-01 に暗号資産交換業登録制が始まり、2023-06-01 には電子決済手段等取引業も制度化された。2026-02-28 時点の金融庁英語版登録一覧では暗号資産交換業者は 27 業者。国内市場は「登録 VASP + JVCEA 会員 + FSA 監督 + 税務報告/CARF」まで含めて見る必要がある。
- Headings: Japan crypto exchange overview — FSA / JVCEA regulated VASP market, TL;DR, 1. 制度结构, 2. Market map, 3. Strategic reading, 4. 监管与政策, Counterpoints, Open questions
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/ssnb, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-foreign-exchange-warning-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-crypto-asset-taxation-detailed, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-binance-japan, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bitbank, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bitflyer, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-btcbox, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-crypto-garage, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-digital-asset-markets

### 国内機関カストディ三強構造 — Komainu / Ginco / Fireblocks Japan 比較
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-institutional-custody-three-pillars
- Source path: exchanges/jp-institutional-custody-three-pillars.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-institutional-custody-three-pillars.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 国内機関向けカストディ市場は 技術 (cold vs MPC) × 親会社 (国内 vs 海外) の二軸で分化している。VASP の自社カストディ (bitFlyer / Coincheck / bitbank 等) と並行して、B2B vendor 層 (機関・他 VASP・金融機関向けインフラ供給) が形成されており、その中核に Komainu / Ginco / Fireblocks Japan の三社が位置する。
- Headings: 国内機関カストディ三強構造 — Komainu / Ginco / Fireblocks Japan 比較, 概要, 三社プロファイル, Komainu Holdings (英国 Jersey), 株式会社 Ginco (国内独立系), Fireblocks Japan (海外 vendor 日本法人), 技術 / ビジネスモデル比較, 規制位置づけ

### 国内 VASP 犯収法 + FATF Travel Rule 国内実装 (2023-)
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-aml-travel-rule-implementation
- Source path: exchanges/jp-vasp-aml-travel-rule-implementation.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-vasp-aml-travel-rule-implementation.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 国内 VASP は 犯罪収益移転防止法 (犯収法) で本人確認 + 取引監視 + 疑わしい取引届出を義務化されている。FATF Recommendation 16 (Travel Rule) は 2023-06 改正犯収法施行で完全実装され、仮想資産送金が ≥ 10 万円相当 で送受信両者の KYC データ伝達が義務化された。AML/CFT 体系は FSA 監督 + JAFIC (警察庁) 情報集約 + JVCEA 自主規制の三層構造で運用される。
- Headings: 国内 VASP 犯収法 + FATF Travel Rule 国内実装 (2023-), 概要, 犯収法上の義務 4 本柱, Travel Rule 国内実装, 海外との相互運用, リスクと課題, Cross-links
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-cold-storage-segregation-rules, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-regulatory-timeline, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/carf-1099da-end-of-crypto-anonymity, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/fatf-travel-rule-cross-border-stack, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/fatf-travel-rule-overview

### 国内暗号資産デリバティブ取引業 制度 — 金商法 × 資金決済法 デュアル登録
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-derivative-license-system
- Source path: exchanges/jp-vasp-derivative-license-system.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-vasp-derivative-license-system.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 2020-05 施行の改正金融商品取引業（金商法）により、暗号資産デリバティブ取引業が「金融商品取引業」の対象に編入された。これにより日本の暗号資産業界は spot 取引（資金決済法 = 暗号資産交換業者登録） と デリバ取引（金商法 = 第一種金融商品取引業者登録） の 二本立て規制 に分離された。同じ「暗号資産」を扱っても、現物受渡しの有無で適用法令と登録ルートが異なる点が他国比較でも特徴的。詳細は 日本金融規制 体系を参照。
- Headings: 国内暗号資産デリバティブ取引業 制度 — 金商法 × 資金決済法 デュアル登録, 制度概要, 二種類のライセンス保有パターン, レバレッジ規制 (2020-), 登録番号体系, 実質的影響: ネット FX 業者の自然な参入
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bi-fxtrade, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bitflyer, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-dmm-com-securities, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-gmo-coin, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-goldenway-japan, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-monex, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-sbi-securities, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-sbi-vc-trade, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-traders-securities, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/japan-financial-regulation

### 国内 VASP 暗号資産流出事件史 (2014-2026)
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-incident-history
- Source path: exchanges/jp-vasp-incident-history.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-vasp-incident-history.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 国内 VASP 史は大規模流出事件によって規制が前進してきた歴史である。Mt.Gox (2014) は資金決済法改正の引き金となり、Coincheck (2018) は自主規制機関 JVCEA 発足とコールド保管比率規制の起点、DMM Bitcoin (2024) は北朝鮮 Lazarus 帰属が公的に確認された大型事案として SBI VC トレードへの事業移管を生んだ。流出は単発事件でなく、ホットウォレット 5% 上限・分別管理義務などの「制度反射」を伴って繰り返されてきた。
- Headings: 国内 VASP 暗号資産流出事件史 (2014-2026), 概要, 主要事件 timeline, 規制反射 (3 段階), Lazarus 帰属の位置づけ, 関連
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-custody-ginco, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-coincheck, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-custodiem, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-dmm-bitcoin, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-zaif, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-foreign-exchange-bitforex, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/japan-financial-regulation

### 国内暗号資産交換業 M&A 統廃合史 (2018-2026)
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-ma-consolidation-history
- Source path: exchanges/jp-vasp-ma-consolidation-history.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-vasp-ma-consolidation-history.md

### 国内 VASP 親会社・株主構造マップ
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-parent-company-map
- Source path: exchanges/jp-vasp-parent-company-map.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-vasp-parent-company-map.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 国内暗号資産交換業者 (VASP) は約 35 社 (2026-05 時点) が FSA 登録済みで、親会社属性により行動様式が大きく異なる。資本系列を 3 大分類で整理すると、(1) 上場会社系（独立した持株会社・事業会社の子会社）、(2) 独立系（親会社なし、創業者・経営陣保有）、(3) 海外系（グローバル CEX の日本法人）に分かれ、それぞれ商品設計・コンプラ姿勢・流動性供給戦略が異なる。
- Headings: 国内 VASP 親会社・株主構造マップ, 概要, 大手金融 conglomerate 系（主要 5 群）, 上場会社系（上記以外）, 海外系（グローバル CEX 日本法人）, 独立系（親会社なし）, 行動様式の差
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-backseat-exchange, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bi-fxtrade, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-binance-japan, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bitbank, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bitflyer, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-btcbox, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-coinbase-japan, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-coincheck, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-crypto-garage, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-custodiem, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-digital-asset-markets

### 国内暗号資産 VASP 規制タイムライン (2014-2026)
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-regulatory-timeline
- Source path: exchanges/jp-vasp-regulatory-timeline.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-vasp-regulatory-timeline.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 日本の暗号資産規制は、国内大型インシデント (Mt.Gox・Coincheck) と 国際協調圧力 (FATF Travel Rule・MiCA・GENIUS Act 等) の両方をトリガーに段階的に積層されてきた。世界で最も早く包括的な VASP 法体系を持つジュリスディクションのひとつで、現在は 資金決済法 + 金商法 + 自主規制 (JVCEA) の三層構造で運用されている。詳細な登録制度は exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system、自主規制詳細は exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview を参照。
- Headings: 国内暗号資産 VASP 規制タイムライン (2014-2026), 概要, 主要 規制マイルストーン (年代順), 規制の三層構造 (2026 時点)
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-foreign-exchange-warning-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-derivative-license-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-incident-history, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/fatf-travel-rule-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/japan-epi-three-types-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/japan-financial-regulation, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/japan-stablecoin-regulatory-landscape

### 国内 VASP セキュリティ・監査・ISMS 認証実態
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-security-audit-certification
- Source path: exchanges/jp-vasp-security-audit-certification.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jp-vasp-security-audit-certification.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 国内 VASP は FSA 監督指針 + JVCEA 自主規制規則 + 業界自主標準 の三層でセキュリティ + 監査義務を負う。法定要件に加え、ISMS (ISO/IEC 27001) や SOC2 Type II 報告書 等の第三者認証取得が事実上のスタンダード化しており、機関投資家オンボーディング + 海外連携 + B2B custody 受託の前提条件となっている。Coincheck NEM 流出 (2018) + DMM Bitcoin Lazarus 流出 (2024) を経て、認証取得は「任意だが取らないと業界に居られない」状態。
- Headings: 国内 VASP セキュリティ・監査・ISMS 認証実態, 概要, 法令上の義務 (改正資金決済法 + 監督指針), 第三者認証 (任意だが事実上必須), 監査法人別 担当 VASP, 国際比較, 関連
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-aml-travel-rule-implementation, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-cold-storage-segregation-rules, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-incident-history, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/korea-cex-five-pillars-comparison, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/us-crypto-licensing-multi-layer-system

### JVCEA — 日本暗号資産取引業協会 自主規制制度 overview
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview
- Source path: exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 1. 会員資格審査 — 入会希望 VASP の体制・コンプライアンスを審査（FSA 登録前後） 2. トークン審査（WhiteList） — 新規上場銘柄の事前審査制度。会員が新銘柄取扱前に JVCEA 承認を取得（事前審査制／簡素化制の二段階、詳細は JVCEA whitelist token listing 参照） 3. 監査・モニタリング — 会員の業務・財務・分別管理の継続的チェック（スポット取引量統計分析 にも反映） 4. 紛争解決（ADR） — 利用者と会員間の苦情・紛争の指定 ADR 機関として対応 5. 啓発・教育 — 業界レポート、統計公表、リテラシー普及活動
- Headings: JVCEA — 日本暗号資産取引業協会 自主規制制度 overview, 1. 概要, 2. 組織・ガバナンス, 3. 自主規制 5 つの中核機能, 4. 会員区分, 5. FSA との関係 — 二重監督構造, Related
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bitflyer, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-bittrade, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-coincheck, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-spot-volume-statistics-analysis, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-whitelist-token-listing, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/japan-financial-regulation

### 韓国 5 大 CEX 制度比較 — Upbit / Bithumb / Coinone / Korbit / GOPAX
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/korea-cex-five-pillars-comparison
- Source path: exchanges/korea-cex-five-pillars-comparison.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/korea-cex-five-pillars-comparison.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 韓国は 特定金融情報法 (특정금융정보법, 2021-03-25 施行) で 仮想資産事業者 (VASP / VA-OP, 가상자산사업자) 登録制度を成立させた。登録 2 要件: (a) KISA (Korea Internet & Security Agency) の ISMS 認証 + (b) 国内銀行との実名口座契約 (실명확인 입출금 계정)。両要件を満たして 金融情報分析院 (FIU, 韓国版 FinCEN) に登録できた取引所のみが KRW 取引ペア (KRW spot market) を提供可能。2026 年時点で KRW 取引可能なのは下記 5 社のみ。コイン-only 取引
- Headings: 韓国 5 大 CEX 制度比較 — Upbit / Bithumb / Coinone / Korbit / GOPAX, 韓国制度概要, 5 強プロファイル, 実名口座銀行契約 (실명확인 입출금 계정), ISMS-CASP 認証, 国際比較, Related
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-cex-top10-comparison, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-regulatory-timeline, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/japan-financial-regulation, https://finwiki.zksc.io/jvcea-self-regulatory-overview

### シンガポール MAS DPT ライセンス制度 — PSA 下の暗号資産取引業
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/sg-mas-dpt-licensing-overview
- Source path: exchanges/sg-mas-dpt-licensing-overview.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/sg-mas-dpt-licensing-overview.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: シンガポールは 2020-01 に PSA (Payment Services Act) を施行し、決済サービスを 7 種に整理した。その中の一つとして DPT (Digital Payment Token) サービスカテゴリが新設され、暗号資産の売買・交換・カストディ等が単一法体系下で規制されることになった。既存の銀行業免許 (Banking Act) や資金移動業免許 (旧 MAS Act ベース) と並列の構造であり、規制当局は MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore, 金融管理局) が一元担当する。FATF Travel Rule 完全準拠 + AML
- Headings: シンガポール MAS DPT ライセンス制度 — PSA 下の暗号資産取引業, 制度概要, ライセンス区分 3 種, 主要保有事業者 (2024-2026 時点), リテール広告制限 (2022-), 戦略的位置づけ
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-cex-top10-comparison, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-vasp-regulatory-comparison-matrix, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/hk-sfc-vasp-licensing-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/korea-cex-five-pillars-comparison, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/global-stablecoin-regulatory-five-pole-matrix, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/singapore-mas-payment-services-act-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/singapore-mas-payment-services-act-strategic-implications, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/three-circles-stablecoin-mra-framework

### スイス FINMA 暗号資産ライセンス + Crypto Valley エコシステム
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/switzerland-finma-crypto-valley-overview
- Source path: exchanges/switzerland-finma-crypto-valley-overview.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/switzerland-finma-crypto-valley-overview.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: スイスは 2018 年に FINMA (Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority) が暗号資産トークン 3 分類ガイドラインを公表 (Payment / Utility / Asset)。既存銀行業法・証券業法・集団投資スキーム法を機能ベースで適用する独自アプローチを採用。新規立法ではなく既存金融法を解釈で対応した点が特徴。2021 年 8 月施行の DLT Act (分散型台帳技術法) により、SIX Digital Exchange (SDX) 等のトークン化証券取引所開設が可能化、世界初の包括的 DLT 立法として国際的注目を浴びた。
- Headings: スイス FINMA 暗号資産ライセンス + Crypto Valley エコシステム, 制度概要, 4 ライセンス区分, 主要事業者, Crypto Valley (Zug カントン), 国際比較, 関連 wiki
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/eu-mica-casp-regime-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-cex-top10-comparison, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-institutional-custody-five-pillars, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-vasp-regulatory-comparison-matrix, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-exchange-laser-digital-japan, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/rwa-tokenization-cex-integration, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/uk-fca-crypto-registration-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/us-crypto-licensing-multi-layer-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/global-stablecoin-regulatory-five-pole-matrix

### 台湾 FSC VASP licensing 制度
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/taiwan-fsc-vasp-licensing-overview
- Source path: exchanges/taiwan-fsc-vasp-licensing-overview.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/taiwan-fsc-vasp-licensing-overview.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: 台湾 FSC (金融監督管理委員會) は 2021-07 AML 法改正で VASP (虛擬資産服務業者) 制度を確立。既存 6 業種 (証券/銀行/保険/期貨/信託/投信) と並行する独自 framework として位置づけ、2024-2025 にかけて専門法 (虛擬資產服務法草案) の立法準備を進めている。アジアで最も柔軟な枠組だが、近い将来構造化が予想される過渡期。
- Headings: 台湾 FSC VASP licensing 制度, 制度概要, 現行制度 (AML 中心), 主要事業者 (2024-2026), 2024 立法動向, 国際比較, Cross-links

### UK FCA crypto-asset registration regime
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/uk-fca-crypto-registration-overview
- Source path: exchanges/uk-fca-crypto-registration-overview.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/exchanges/uk-fca-crypto-registration-overview.md
- Domain: exchanges
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: Brexit 後 (2020-01) UK は EU MiCA から独立し、独自の暗号資産規制路線を選択。FCA (Financial Conduct Authority) による暗号資産事業者登録は MLR 2017 (Money Laundering Regulations 2017) ベースの AML/CFT 登録のみ で、証券性のあるトークンや規制資産は別 framework (FSMA) で扱う二層構造。2026-2027 に向けて暗号資産の phased regulation (段階的規制) が進行中で、現行の AML 中心の枠組みから trading/custody/stable
- Headings: UK FCA crypto-asset registration regime, 1. 制度概要, 2. 制度の二段階構造, 3. 主要保有事業者 (2024-2026), 4. 2024 Financial Promotion Regulation, 5. 戦略的位置づけ, Cross-links
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/eu-mica-casp-regime-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/fsa-vasp-registration-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-cex-top10-comparison, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/global-vasp-regulatory-comparison-matrix, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/hk-sfc-vasp-licensing-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/jp-vasp-aml-travel-rule-implementation, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/sg-mas-dpt-licensing-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/uae-vara-licensing-overview, https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/us-crypto-licensing-multi-layer-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/global-stablecoin-regulatory-five-pole-matrix

- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/jp-stablecoin-dcjpy
- Source path: fintech/jp-stablecoin-dcjpy.md

### Japan earthquake insurance public-private scheme
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/insurance/earthquake-insurance-public-private-scheme
- Source path: insurance/earthquake-insurance-public-private-scheme.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/insurance/earthquake-insurance-public-private-scheme.md
- Domain: insurance
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: Japanese household earthquake insurance is not a normal private non-life product. It is a public-private scheme involving private non-life insurers, Japan Earthquake Reinsurance, and the Japanese government. It is normally attached to household fire insurance and is designed for residential building
- Headings: Japan earthquake insurance public-private scheme, Overview, Scheme Map, Product Boundary, Reinsurance Mechanics, Difference From Nat-Cat Reinsurance, Scheme Effects, Source Fields
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/japan-earthquake-reinsurance, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/msad, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/sompo, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/toa-reinsurance, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/tokio-marine, https://finwiki.zksc.io/insurance/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/insurance/japan-nonlife-big-three, https://finwiki.zksc.io/insurance/natcat-reinsurance-japan, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/INDEX

### Economic value-based solvency regulation

- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: Japan's economic value-based solvency regime is the insurance-capital framework that looks through the accounting balance sheet and evaluates assets, liabilities, capital, and risk on a more market-consistent economic basis. FSA frames the regime around three pillars: solvency regulation, insurer ri

### Japan insurance agency and brokerage

- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: Insurance distribution in Japan is mapped by authority and responsibility. An insurer, an insurance agent / solicitor, an insurance broker, a bank counter, a retailer, a platform app, and a comparison site can all touch the customer journey, but they do not carry the same legal role.

### Point liability accounting boundary (JP loyalty programs)
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/loyalty/point-liability-accounting-boundary
- Source path: loyalty/point-liability-accounting-boundary.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/loyalty/point-liability-accounting-boundary.md
- Domain: loyalty
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: "Points" in Japan are not one accounting concept. The same word covers (1) marketing-promotional grants that are pure expense, (2) loyalty liabilities that are deferred revenue under IFRS 15 / ASBJ Statement No.29, (3) breakage assumptions that drive when revenue is finally recognised, (4) purchased
- Headings: Point liability accounting boundary (JP loyalty programs), TL;DR, Five accounting buckets, 1. Marketing-promotional cost (no contract liability), 2. Loyalty liability under IFRS 15 / ASBJ Statement No.29, 3. Breakage assumption (when deferred revenue is recognised), 4. Purchased / charged value (prepaid boundary), 5. Cross-program exchange points (settlement leg + accounting timing)
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/aeon-bank, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/legal-financial-licenses/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/legal-financial-licenses/payment-license-stack, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/ndfg, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/paypay-fg, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/rakuten-fg, https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/loyalty/INDEX, https://finwiki.zksc.io/loyalty/japan-points-landscape, https://finwiki.zksc.io/loyalty/v-point-smbc-ccc-case, https://finwiki.zksc.io/payments/INDEX

### Japan bank API incident and fraud-control map
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/payments/japan-bank-api-incident-and-fraud-control
- Source path: payments/japan-bank-api-incident-and-fraud-control.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/payments/japan-bank-api-incident-and-fraud-control.md
- Domain: payments
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: Bank API risk in Japan is not only a cybersecurity issue. It is a control chain across bank authentication, customer consent, electronic payment agency registration, API contracts, unauthorized withdrawal response, suspicious-transaction monitoring, reimbursement / complaint handling, and downstream
- Headings: Japan bank API incident and fraud-control map, Overview, Incident Surface, Control Stack, Why The Boundary Matters, JapanFG Relevance, Investigation Checklist, Related

- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/payments/japan-card-issuer-acquirer-processor-split

- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: Japan card payments is split into at least five roles: issuer, international / domestic brand, acquirer, card-number contract / merchant-contracting operator, and processor / PSP. A single group can hold several roles, but FinWiki does not flatten them into "credit-card company."

### Japan policy finance system
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/japan-policy-finance-system
- Source path: policy-finance/japan-policy-finance-system.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/policy-finance/japan-policy-finance-system.md
- Domain: policy-finance
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: Japan's policy-finance system is not a single bank. It is a layered state-finance toolkit: JFC for domestic SME / agriculture / education-adjacent credit, JBIC for overseas investment and export finance, JICA for ODA implementation, NEXI for trade and investment insurance, JOGMEC for resource securi
- Headings: Japan policy finance system, TL;DR, System map, Strategic read, Counterpoints, Open questions, Related, Sources
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/jbic, https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/jfc, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/agriculture-credit-guarantee-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/fisheries-credit-guarantee-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/japan-credit-guarantee-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/japan-housing-finance-agency, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/japan-student-services-organization, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/jica, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/jogmec, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/national-federation-credit-guarantee-corporations, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/nexi, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/oecd-export-credit-arrangement

Read it with JapanFG/jbic, policy-finance/nexi, and policy-finance/jogmec for each institution in isolation, with policy-finance/oecd-export-credit-arrangement
- Headings: Japan project finance stack diagram (JOGMEC / JBIC / NEXI / megabank / SPV), Wiki route, TL;DR, ASCII diagram of the stack, Each institution's role, JOGMEC — equity / exploration risk, JBIC — sovereign-aligned overseas investment loan, untied loan, export buyer credit, NEXI — political-risk / commercial-risk insurance

### JICA (Japan International Cooperation Agency)
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/jica
- Source path: policy-finance/jica.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/policy-finance/jica.md
- Domain: policy-finance
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: JICA is Japan's main ODA implementation agency. In the FinWiki policy-finance map, it should be separated from JBIC: JICA is centered on development cooperation and ODA implementation, while JBIC is closer to export / investment finance and commercially anchored overseas project finance.
- Headings: JICA (Japan International Cooperation Agency), TL;DR, Role map, Strategic read, Counterpoints, Open questions, Related, Sources
- First resolved wikilinks: https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/jbic, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/japan-policy-finance-system, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/japan-student-services-organization, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/nexi, https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/oecd-export-credit-arrangement

### Japan Federation of Credit Guarantee Corporations
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/national-federation-credit-guarantee-corporations
- Source path: policy-finance/national-federation-credit-guarantee-corporations.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/policy-finance/national-federation-credit-guarantee-corporations.md
- Domain: policy-finance
- Type: wiki_entry
- Summary: The Japan Federation of Credit Guarantee Corporations is the national federation for Japan's 51 local credit guarantee corporations. It is not itself the whole guarantee system; it is the coordinating, research, training, support, and guarantee-business support body behind policy-finance/japan-credi
- Headings: Japan Federation of Credit Guarantee Corporations, TL;DR, 1. Institutional boundary, 2. Role map, 3. Why it matters, 4. Boundary cases, Related, Sources

- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/securities/japan-margin-trading-and-securities-finance

### FinWiki Internal Link Improvement Plan
- URL: https://finwiki.zksc.io/wiki-link-improvement-plan
- Source path: wiki-link-improvement-plan.md
- GitHub source: https://github.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/blob/main/wiki-link-improvement-plan.md
- Domain: root
- Type: control_doc
- Summary: 1. Fix Priority A first with hand-written body sentences, not footer-only links. 2. For large registry pages, add one short prose paragraph that names the registry route, the nearest domain index, and one adjacent system page. 3. Re-run python3 tools/wikilinkaudit.py --report wiki-link-improvement-p
- Headings: FinWiki Internal Link Improvement Plan, Summary, Wiki Linking Standard, Priority A: Failing Entries, Priority B: Current Worktree Entries To Review, Domain Snapshot, Execution Notes
